goal: Add a side-effect-free intake normalizer for live AICOS card snapshots that validates, normalizes, deduplicates, and quarantines card data before it can feed card-conditioned dispatch. Do not call AICOS, maya-core, providers, runtime dispatch, GitHub, database, frontend, package scripts, or external services.
scope_out: Do not call AICOS or any external service.
Do not add a cache, persistence layer, runtime route, provider call, GitHub write, or database write.
Do not add package scripts, dependencies, environment variables, deployment notes, or frontend files.
Do not change card-conditioned dispatch semantics.
claims: Live card snapshots can be validated and normalized before dispatch without calling AICOS.
Invalid, duplicate, or evidence-less card snapshots are quarantined fail-closed.
Accepted snapshots are returned as DispatchConditionCard-compatible data.
The intake normalizer is side-effect-free and tested independently.
assumptions: A later block may fetch live AICOS data; this block only validates passed-in snapshots.
Card evidence references are required before a live card can influence dispatch.
Quarantine output is enough for operator review at this stage.
dod: builder/src/aicosCardBindingIntake.ts exports side-effect-free intake types and normalizer.
The normalizer returns accepted cards and quarantined snapshots with deterministic reasons.
The normalizer rejects invalid IDs, missing titles, invalid status/policy, unsafe paths, missing evidence, and duplicates.
builder/tests/aicosCardBindingIntake.test.ts covers accepted card, invalid fields, duplicate, unsafe path, and no-mutation behavior.
review-packets/BPK-010.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused intake test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: A live AICOS call, cache, persistence layer, route, provider, database, GitHub write, package change, deployment change, or frontend file becomes necessary.
Changing card-conditioned dispatch behavior becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-009 created a cockpit-consumable projection contract. BPK-010 should prepare live card data intake without fetching or trusting live data implicitly.
